notes: Bundled fallback snapshot from the DeepSeek Chinese official pricing page. Run dsproxy pricing refresh --write-cache --json to replace it with a locally fetched official_docs_html cache.
The Chinese DeepSeek pricing page is the primary source for CNY display and cost estimates. The English USD page is retained as fallback/i18n source.
Cost estimates must display source metadata and must not present bundled snapshot prices as freshly fetched official prices.
